title: Digital banks & apps — compare subscription tiers
intro: Plan-based pricing is common — read limits, ATM, and FX rules on each provider’s official NL disclosures.

items.reason: Dutch-licensed digital bank — compare subscription tiers and included cards on bunq’s pricing page.
Multi-currency app — validate weekend and plan surcharges before relying on it for large sends.
Mobile euro account — confirm current NL product scope and fee schedule on N26’s site.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
